zara.position: center frame, feet planted wide on cracked floorboards
zara.pose: victory stance, fists at her sides, chin high

mia.position: left of Zara, standing close, head level with Zara's chest
mia.pose: looking straight up, the closed book hugged to her chest

spatial_rules: size comparison is the point: Mia's head reaches only Zara's chest height; both standing on the same floor plane
four hands total: Zara's two fists at her sides, Mia's two hands on the book
low hero angle - camera at knee height looking up; ceiling lamp sits level with Zara's shoulder
lighting: lamp key from below-left, teal rim from the book
